category_sources: source_facts.description says nef provides steroids for Xcode Playgrounds; official nef docs describe it as a command line tool for creating documentation from Swift Playgrounds.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and docs use the lowercase product name nef; source_facts.name is nef.
docs_sources: Official nef documentation domain provides getting-started documentation and API docs; source_facts.homepage is the official nef site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/bow-swift/nef, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Xcode Playgrounds; official nef docs mention Swift Playgrounds, documentation generation, Markdown export, Jekyll, and command-line usage.
